---
title: Package Ultimate Snake like a PR
description: Summarize the Snake work as a reviewable PR with scope, risks, reviewer checklist, and human judgment notes.
mode: ask
---
Use `#file:README.md`, `#file:.github/copilot-instructions.md`, and the implementation files as context.

Create a review-ready package for this Snake lab:

1. a concise PR title
2. a PR body with summary, key changes, and validation notes
3. a reviewer checklist
4. a short release-note style summary
5. a note about what still requires human judgment

Also call out:

- any risky gameplay logic
- any debugging or diagnostics additions
- any documentation or diagram artifacts that reviewers should inspect
